top3.sql:
SELECT p.SEX, p.Birthday
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE l.GOT IS NOT NULL
  AND l.Date LIKE '1994%'
  AND l.GOT BETWEEN 5 AND 40;

SELECT p.SEX, p.Birthday
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE l.GOT IS NOT NULL
  AND l.Date LIKE '1994%'
  AND l.GOT BETWEEN 5 AND 40;  -- Assuming normal GOT range is 5-40 U/L

SELECT p.SEX, p.Birthday
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE l.GOT IS NOT NULL
  AND l.Date LIKE '1994%'
  AND l.GOT BETWEEN 5 AND 40;

SELECT DISTINCT p.SEX, p.Birthday
FROM Patient p
INNER JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE l.GOT BETWEEN 5 AND 40
  AND l.Date >= '1994-01-01'
  AND l.Date <= '1994-12-31';

SELECT p.SEX, p.Birthday
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE l.GOT IS NOT NULL
  AND l.Date LIKE '1994%'
  AND l.GOT >= 5 AND l.GOT <= 40;

SELECT p.SEX, p.Birthday
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE l.GOT IS NOT NULL
  AND l.Date LIKE '1994%'
  AND l.GOT BETWEEN 5 AND 40;

SELECT DISTINCT p.SEX, p.Birthday
FROM Patient p
INNER JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE l.GOT BETWEEN 5 AND 40
  AND l.Date >= '1994-01-01'
  AND l.Date <= '1994-12-31';

SELECT DISTINCT p.SEX, p.Birthday
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE l.GOT >= 5 AND l.GOT <= 40
  AND strftime('%Y', l.Date) = '1994';

final.sql:
SELECT p.SEX, p.Birthday
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE l.GOT IS NOT NULL
  AND l.Date LIKE '1994%'
  AND l.GOT BETWEEN 5 AND 40;
